title: Do not eat too many things at a meal
Avoid peculiar additives, such as vinegar, monosodium glutamate, etc
Vary your diet from meal to meal
Never eat anything prepared in aluminum
Aside from fresh, raw, juices or the green drink, drink all your liquids (water) between meals, not with your meals
As a rule, eat your fruits at one meal and vegetables at another
Greens have more compacted vitamins and minerals than other type of food
Nova scotia dulse and norwegian kelp (two types of seaweed) are the only rich source of trace minerals
Blackstrap molasses is the only very rich source of iron
The best pattern is to rest before the meal, and walk around after it, not vice versa
